_comment: Map modifiers / biomes per Phase 10.1 concept-demo DNA pass (AoE DNA — age-as-civ-history flavor). Each biome applies a single passive modifier to a Skirmish match. Skirmish mode-select will render biome chips when this file is present. NOT active in Co-op Horde until PM approves (snapshot-schema additive requires host/guest agreement on biome ID). All numbers [PROPOSAL] until playtest ratifies. Port target: Godot 4 Resource array (res://data/mapmods/*.tres).

neutral.name: Neutral
neutral.description: No environmental tilt. Clean reference conditions.

volcanic.name: Volcanic
volcanic.description: Ember-tilt ground. +10% damage to Ember-lineage towers.

ruins.name: Ruins
ruins.description: Abandoned foundations. Forge-lineage towers cost 10% less.
